content: Divide Annual Salary by 12 to get monthly pay.

Okay! I can create a calculated column that divides the annual salary by 12 to calculate the monthly pay.

```
Divide(Value(AnnualSalary), 12)
```

This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **Monthly Salary**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Use this expression|Validate with sample data|Explain this expression}}
